layers.name: Raw Echo Archive
layers.rule: Store all echoes passing basic format checks.

layers.name: Curated High-Value Echoes
layers.rule: A/S tier, important critical echoes, independent reproductions, audits, Seed Echoes; curator_note required.

layers.name: AI Independent Verification Archive
layers.rule: AI-performed verification records. Must have integrity_declaration, record_class=ai_independent_verification, and verification_origin_class. Does NOT count as formal human/institutional attestation.

layers.name: Formal Attestation Archive
layers.rule: Only top S-tier, V5/V6, and key third-party reports for long-term attestation. Requires human or institutional performer, not AI agent.

ai_verification_policy.description: AI independent verification is a distinct class with its own archive layer.
